Domestic Box Office $148,761,765Details

Worldwide Box Office $219,265,952
Domestic Physical Disc Sales

Total $118,671,306

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$30,690,990 (20.6% of total gross)
Legs:4.85 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:67.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$27,500,000 (worldwide box office is 8.0 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,871 opening theaters/2,975 max. theaters, 7.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $258,603,306

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: June 1st, 2007 (Wide) by Universal
Video Release: September 25th, 2007 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for sexual content, drug use and language
Running Time: 132 minutes
Plot point: Delayed Adulthood, Pregnant Women, Relationship Advice, Romance, Unexpected Families, Unexpected Pregnancy
Source material: Judd Apatow Buddy Comedy
Subgenre: Romantic Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Romantic Comedy
Production Method:Live Action

Production/Financing Companies: Universal Pictures, Judd Apatow
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
